text: - 1.13.4 All persons operating equipment operators must be trained on the specific equipment they are authorized to operate equipment. Subcontractor must provide verification of training/certification and or a statement signed by an executive officer. Such statement will include but not be limited to, operator's name, type of equipment; specific job name the operator will be operating equipment and specific requirements for that jobsite to include emergency procedures. This training is specific to the make and model in use.
